name: Maple Frosted Apple Pan-Tart
recipeInstructions:
Prepare pastry for a two-crust pie. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Place one circle of pastry on an ungreased cookie sheet. Sprinkle cornflakes over the pastry, leaving at least half an inch from the edge. Arrange apples on top; sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon. Brush the edge of the pastry with egg white. Place the remaining circle of pastry over the filling. Fold the edge of the bottom pastry over the top pastry and flute the edges to seal. Make several slits in the top pastry, brush with beaten egg white, and bake for 45 to 55 minutes or until apples are tender and crust is golden brown. In a small bowl, combine glaze ingredients. Drizzle over warm crust. Cut into wedges and serve warm or at room temperature.
